name: HeroBannerColumnsRatio
description:
Available HeroBanner columns ratio options.

Defines how the two content blocks are sized relative to each other within the hero banner.
When no value is set, the content renders in a single column.

values.name: Equal
values.description: Two equal columns. Both content blocks share the available width equally.
values._jsDoc:
/**
 * Two equal columns. Both content blocks share the available width equally.
 * 
 * @private
 */

values.name: FirstWider
values.description: Two unequal columns. The first content block takes two-thirds of the width, the second takes one-third.
values._jsDoc:
/**
 * Two unequal columns. The first content block takes two-thirds of the width, the second takes one-third.
 * 
 * @private
 */

_jsDoc:
/**
 * Available HeroBanner columns ratio options.
 * 
 * Defines how the two content blocks are sized relative to each other within the hero banner.
 * When no value is set, the content renders in a single column.
 * 
 * @enum {string}
 * @alias module:@ui5/webcomponents-fiori/dist/types/HeroBannerColumnsRatio
 * @ui5-module-override @ui5/webcomponents-fiori HeroBannerColumnsRatio
 * @private
 */
